data.title: Weed Launches AI-Powered Global Well-Being Platform
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, June 12, 2025- Weed, a wellness-focused company, unveiled its new global well-being platform, combining advanced artificial intelligence with decentralized Web3 technology. Backed by more than $20 million in intellectual property acquisition and product development, Weed aims to redefine wellness by merging technology with culture to foster a healthier, participatory lifestyle economy. Unlike typical AI […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/weed-launches-ai-powered-global-well-being-platform

data.title: This Dogecoin Rival Could Go Higher Amid Increased Whale Activity, Says Analytics Platform Santiment
data.description:
New data from the market intelligence firm Santiment reveals that Dogecoin (DOGE) rival Shiba Inu (SHIB) could skyrocket as whale activity around the meme asset increases. In a new analysis, Santiment says that historically, deep-pocketed investors making moves worth over $100,000 have predated peaks in prices for digital assets.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/13/this-dogecoin-rival-could-go-higher-amid-increased-whale-activity-says-analytics-platform-santiment/

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Hit Hard by Geopolitical Tensions: Binance Funding Rates Signal Deep Bearish Shift
data.description:
Ethereum plunged below key support after geopolitical tensions erupted, which caused mass liquidations and pushed Bitcoin funding rates deeply negative on Binance.

data.title: Proof of Talk 2025: RWAs, Stablecoins and Crypto IPOs Demonstrate Sector Growth
data.description:
Proof of Talk 2025 has gathered thousands at the Louvre’s Musée des Arts Décoratifs, as speakers from Mastercard and a16z have assessed stablecoins’ payment utility, tokenized RWAs’ path to $30 trn and how crypto IPOs like Circle’s can mature the sector and attract institutional capital.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/proof-of-talk-2025-rwa-stablecoins-crypto-ipos/

data.title: TonBit Finds, Fixes Major Bug in TON Virtual Machine
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, June 12, 2025-TonBit, a security arm of BitsLab and the primary security assurance provider for the TON blockchain, has identified a serious vulnerability in the TON Virtual Machine (TVM), the companies announced recently. The flaw involves the RUNVM instruction, which may allow attackers to corrupt smart contract libraries by exploiting a non-atomic state […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/tonbit-finds-fixes-major-bug-in-ton-virtual-machine

data.title: Polygon Edges Out Tron In Crucial Performance Metric, Will Price Follow?
data.description:
The current ecosystem trend shows that Polygon crypto has overtaken Tron in a key performance test. This raises questions among crypto investors about what this could mean for the Polygon price. Notably, the major leadership changes at the Polygon Foundation and technical interest are shaping what could be a breakout phase for the token
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/13/polygon-edges-out-tron-in-crucial-performance-metric-will-price-follow/

data.title: Whales counter-trade retail’s bearish predictions on BTC
data.description:
BTC whales, institutions and smart money counter-trade the bearish attitudes of retail. During peak bear-posting on social media, smart money continue or accelerate their accumulation.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/whales-counter-trade-retails-bearish-btc/

data.title: Invesco and Galaxy chase Solana ETF dream with Delaware trust registration
data.description:
Invesco and Galaxy Digital have taken a concrete step toward bringing a Solana exchange-traded fund (ETF) to the US market. Public records show that the firms registered a trust named Invesco Galaxy Solana ETF with Delaware’s Division of Corporations on June 12.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/invesco-and-galaxy-chase-solana-etf-dream-with-delaware-trust-registration/
